name: Salmon Rollups
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the salmon, beaten egg, parsley, onion powder, and dill weed.
2. Spread the mixture onto the rolled-out crescent dough.
3. Roll up the crescent dough from the wide end after spreading the filling.
4. Place on a baking sheet and bake at 350°F for 12 to 15 minutes.
5. Serve with a cheese sauce topping.
